articles.title: What's in the US-Iran agreement?
articles.description: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.

articles.title: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
articles.description: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.

articles.title: Young women now have 'close to zero' risk of cervical cancer death after HPV jab
articles.description: A new study finds that hundreds of lives have been saved since school-age girls were offered the HPV jab in 2008.

articles.title: Church of England apologises for role in forced adoptions
articles.description: Thousands of unmarried women were pressured to give up their babies between 1949 and 1976.
